item.title: Version 1.2.1 — silent auto-update fix
item.description:
Abalone Flow 1.2.1

A quick follow-up to 1.2.0. The automatic update flow wasn't reliably surfacing the "Restart to Update" button when a new version was available in the background — you'd either see nothing, or occasionally a stray Sparkle dialog. This fixes both.

Change

  • Sparkle now downloads new versions silently in the background (as intended) and the "Restart to Update" capsule appears automatically under the sidebar logo, in Settings, and in the app menu — no dialogs to dismiss.

No behaviour changes to dictation, cloud sync, or telemetry from 1.2.0.

Requires macOS 14 Sonoma or later. Apple Silicon.

item.title: Version 1.2.0 — per-device telemetry + privacy policy
item.description:
Abalone Flow 1.2.0

New: the app now reports non-sensitive device info when you sign in, so we can debug issues faster and understand what Macs and OS versions our users are on. Nothing changes in how dictation works — your voice is still transcribed locally on your Mac.

What gets reported

  • Mac model, chip, macOS version, app version, locale, timezone, and a stable hardware identifier — sent to our server the first time you sign in and on each launch afterwards.
  • IP address and country (derived by our edge provider) — logged for security monitoring.

What does not get collected

  • No precise location, no contact lists, no browsing history, no data from other apps.
  • No selling, sharing, or licensing of your data. No ad networks. No AI training on what you say.

Full details, including how to request deletion, are in our privacy policy. If you'd rather not share this data, email vincent@vincentwei.co and we'll delete your account on request.

Requires macOS 14 Sonoma or later. Apple Silicon.

item.title: Version 1.1.3 — silent Restart to Update
item.description:
Abalone Flow 1.1.3

Smoother update flow — no more dialogs to click through.

Change

  • "Restart to Update" is now silent. Clicking the button used to surface two Sparkle dialogs ("Update Available" and then "Install and Relaunch"). Now it just quits the app, installs the new version, and relaunches — no clicks needed.

Requires macOS 14 Sonoma or later. Apple Silicon.

item.title: Version 1.1.2 — launch fix for China
item.description:
Abalone Flow 1.1.2

Fixes a launch failure reported by users in mainland China.

Fix

  • "Apple could not verify" dialog on first launch. The notarization ticket is now stapled to the app bundle itself, so Gatekeeper can verify offline — no need to reach Apple's servers. This unblocks users in regions where Apple's notarization endpoints are throttled.

No other behavior changes. Requires macOS 14 Sonoma or later. Apple Silicon.

item.title: Version 1.1.1 — bug-fix release
item.description:
Abalone Flow 1.1.1

Bug fixes for home stats, hands-free, and push-to-talk.

Fixes

  • Home stats from cloud DB. Weekly streak and 7-day WPM now read from the full cloud dataset, not the 200-row local cache.
  • Modifier-only hands-free fires instantly. No more 150 ms hold before Control+Command (or any modifier combo bound to hands-free) starts recording.
  • Push-to-talk no longer hangs after a mode switch. Pressing push-to-talk to stop hands-free used to silently break the key until a restart.
  • Double-tap to re-enter hands-free works every time. After stopping hands-free with a single tap, the next double-tap was being dropped.

Requires macOS 14 Sonoma or later. Apple Silicon.

item.title: Version 1.1.0 — Richer mid-session mode switching
item.description:
Abalone Flow 1.1.0

Better mid-session control, more configurable hotkeys, fewer false scolds.

New hotkey gestures

  • Latch mid-session: Hold your PTT key, then press your hands-free combo — recording continues, now in hands-free.
  • Double-tap modifier-only PTT: E.g. Control alone, now toggles hands-free. Used to only work on Fn.
  • Single-tap to stop hands-free: Press your PTT key once during an active session to stop and transcribe.
  • Extend the chord: Ctrl → Ctrl+Cmd during PTT promotes into hands-free. Works with any binding you configure.
  • Confirmation sound: A short "Pop" plays on mode flips so you always know what state you're in.

Fixes

  • Hotkeys attach at HID driver level — other dictation apps can't steal your keys.
  • Accidental short taps (<200 ms) no longer trigger the "No speech detected" warning.

Requires macOS 14 Sonoma or later. Apple Silicon.

item.title: Version 1.0.0 — Speak 3x faster than you type. Anywhere on your Mac.
item.description:
Abalone Flow 1.0.0

Speak 3x faster than you type. Anywhere on your Mac.

You speak at 140 words per minute. You type at 40. Abalone Flow closes that gap everywhere you'd normally type — Mail, Slack, Claude Code, Cursor, Obsidian, Linear, Notion.

Hold a key. Speak. Release. Your words land at the cursor, already punctuated and capitalized, before you've taken your hand off the key.

The five things that matter

  • Transcription runs on your Mac. OpenAI Whisper via WhisperKit, native on Apple Silicon. Audio never leaves your machine.
  • Your history syncs across devices. Transcribed text follows you from laptop to desktop; audio stays local.
  • One-click sign-in with Google. No forms, no email to verify, no inbox ceremony.
  • Free. No subscription, no credit card, no word limits today.
  • Near-perfect accuracy. ~97% on clean English. Swap in Large-v3 for broadcast-grade transcription.

Requires macOS 14 Sonoma or later. Apple Silicon (M1, M2, M3, M4).
